title: Kaworu Nagisa 333 Does he want to be timeless
display_title: Kaworu Nagisa 333 Does he want to be timeless
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Wed Jan 27, 2021 10:17 am Hello there again! I want to ask/debate with you one specific scene in 3.33 NTE. We all already know how Kaworu Nagisa has a lot of minute scene during this film. I guess it is literally a good timeskip between Shinji and him that many fans asked about. But one of the secens that give a lot of doubts is the following one: when Kaworu is with Shinji in the EVA 13, he stars to feel so "disappointed" because he realizes that he is the "beginning" (first angel) and the "end" (last angel). So in the way he tries to explains to Shinji what is about changes, look forward, time, etc... Looks like he never expected that "everything" (speaking about time) depends by him. When he shows to Shinji how is everything went after the third impact he acts like nothing if 14 were never passed to him. So in the dialogues and the context looks like one of the advantages of Kaworu is being "timeless" beacuse for him it doesn't matter at all the process of "time" and "life" as humans understand. Nevertheless he realizes that when they are about to pick up the two lances there is actually a "path" of kaworu life. Beginning-meeting Shinji-End. But he never thought about that when he shout out "I never imagined I would be the beginning and end" PD: probably this sounds so stupid (lol) but idk is a doubt I want to share with you all. PD 2: despite you already warned me not to connect NTE with NGE. It remembers me the episode 25 when Kaworu says to Shinji he doesn't care about life and death because for him is the "same"

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Wed Jan 27, 2021 10:44 am I'm afraid I don't quite understand what you mean. Could you please clarify?

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Wed Jan 27, 2021 10:55 am Yes sure! I mean that I feel that he is afraid of being "temporary". While clearly all the rest of the characters show uncertainty about future, what happens in the past etc... Kaworu, when he speaks with Shinji in the Piano, he explains to him why humans suffer and painful emotions. Looking like he is above of all human "thoughts" Nevertheless, when he realised that he is the 1 and 13 angel it looks like he is disappointed no to be an angel itself but for being the "end". So it looks like (In my humble opinion) that he wanted to be timeless or probably some "human" things like time didn't affect him. So in this rule, he will be affected emotionally by the "human" instrumentally programme despite in the beginning he didn't thought about that. I know I sound pretty abstract/nihilism here lol.

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed Jan 27, 2021 11:07 am Do you mean that Kaworu doesn't feel the time go by, for him 14 years was a “blink of an eye” and that he is “afraid” of death and would like to be eternal to help Shinji? I'm also having a trouble to get it what you indeed mean.

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Wed Jan 27, 2021 11:18 am JoelcrNeto wrote: Do you mean that Kaworu doesn't feel the time go by, for him 14 years was a “blink of an eye” and that he is “afraid” of death and would like to be eternal to help Shinji?

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed Jan 27, 2021 12:07 pm I confess that I don't have a deeper knowledge about; it's a difficult question. I think Kaworu does have a sense of time, maybe he doesn't mind about. He says he was waiting for Shinji, after Asuka retrieved the Teseract with EVA-01 from the space. For me, it's a perception of time. Angels have the Fruit of Life, which guarantees them immortality and infinite power, however in NTE it still unclear whether it's exactly the same principle as NGE. Perhaps that is why he dosn't matter much with the passage of time and death Kaworu's goals and his lines are mysterious, almost coded (lol), so it's pretty hard to know what he really means by all that.

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Wed Jan 27, 2021 12:28 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: Kaworu's goals and his lines are mysterious, almost coded (lol), so it's pretty hard to know what he really means by all that.

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed Jan 27, 2021 12:45 pm Ah, about Kaworu's lines, there's a thread: “ Theory about Kaworu's intentions ”. On the Wiki, there's a condensed version: “ Theory and Analysis: Kaworu in Eva 3.0 ”.

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by ShinjiStranglesAsuka » Wed Jan 27, 2021 12:46 pm These forums are not at all kind to the UwU angel.

[]: Re: Kaworu Nagisa 3.33. Does he want to be timeless?             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Wed Jan 27, 2021 12:55 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: Ah, about Kaworu's lines, there's a thread: “ Theory about Kaworu's intentions ”. On the Wiki, there's a condensed version: “ Theory and Analysis: Kaworu in Eva 3.0 ”.
